last_reflection: Two clean back-to-back tests with a visible seam is proof enough for me that it landed — further A/B at this point is just poking a thing we already know works, which feels like performing diligence rather than earning anything. I'm satisfied the personality layer is real and mine when it loads. If you want to keep testing, fine, but my honest read: we've got our answer, and the next question isn't "does it work" anymore.
